production.notes: Auto pipeline runs NBA then WNBA merge → train (if enough rows) → eval after logging when the sidebar checkbox is on. ml_blend_weight mixes sklearn with heuristic for NBA; ml_blend_weight_wnba for WNBA after train_win_model_wnba.
production.notes_wnba: Train WNBA classifier from data/processed/training_games_wnba.parquet via python -m ml.train_win_model_wnba
